items.name_en: 【Genuine Leather】Bulk Stock🔥Marmont Series Half-Moon Bag#
items.name_cn:
【Genuine Leather】Bulk Stock🔥Marmont Series Half-Moon Bag#
 With Box🔥Model:699514▫️Size:21.5*11*5cm
The classic Marmont shoulder bag returns as a best-seller for all seasons. Featuring a crescent shape, the 3D embroidery on genuine leather is full and beautiful ➕ Solid brass hardware❗️The bag's contour fits the body's lines perfectly. Can be carried by hand, on the shoulder, or crossbody. An incredibly high-value bag. It's simply a walking trendsetter!

items.name_en: 【Top】🔥Marmont Quilted
items.name_cn:
【Top】🔥Marmont Quilted
Brand new Tote bag, the entire body is made of original factory cowhide❗️Added a lock design at the opening for extra security. The original leather texture is amazing. The 3D quilted pattern comes alive under the light. Very easy to style and suits all heights. A versatile must-have item!
Model 681483 Dimensions 26.5*19*11cm

items.name_en: 【Top Original】With Packaging 🔥Reflecting its origins, GG Marmont features black matelassé leather with a soft structure. The Gucci Love Parade collection celebrates archival codes and new designs. This accessory features monochrome hardware and a top handle, embodying this concept.
items.name_cn:
【Top Original】With Packaging 🔥Reflecting its origins, GG Marmont features black matelassé leather with a soft structure. The Gucci Love Parade collection celebrates archival codes and new designs. This accessory features monochrome hardware and a top handle, embodying this concept.
Model: 702563, Color: Black/Black Hardware, Dimensions: 21*15.5*8

specs.rawTitle:
【Top Original】With Packaging 🔥Reflecting its origins, GG Marmont features black matelassé leather with a soft structure. The Gucci Love Parade collection celebrates archival codes and new designs. This accessory features monochrome hardware and a top handle, embodying this concept.

items.name_en: 【Top Original】🔥Full Leather Packaging
items.name_cn:
【Top Original】🔥Full Leather Packaging
The Double G represents the unremitting effort to reshape and reutilize classic silhouettes. Matching Double G accessories compose a modern narrative, and classic elements are cleverly presented in a renewed style on this GGMarmont V-shaped quilted leather waist bag.
Material✨Uses boutique-quality texture, natural full-grain imported cowhide, and matching hardware.
Dimensions 12x12.5x7cm Model 739599

items.name_en: [Genuine Leather] 🔥 The GG Marmont series reinterprets the classic quilted V-shaped leather with a new silhouette and size, showcasing the charm of early autumn. This medium tote is crafted in beige, with gold-tone hardware complementing the stylish silhouette.
items.name_cn:
[Genuine Leather] 🔥 The GG Marmont series reinterprets the classic quilted V-shaped leather with a new silhouette and size, showcasing the charm of early autumn. This medium tote is crafted in beige, with gold-tone hardware complementing the stylish silhouette.
Beige quilted V-shaped leather
Gold-tone hardware
Brown suede texture, microfiber lining
Double G logo
Inside: 1 zip pocket
Handle height: 22cm
Zip closure
